svg.title: Phase 14 — Order confirmation email with Resend
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing the checkout success flow: browser calls confirmOrder, server verifies with Stripe, updates DB to paid, clears cart, then fires a non-blocking email via Resend to the buyer.
svg.text: Phase 14 — Order confirmation email with Resend

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Stripe confirm payment status?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the order is updated to paid?')
sendPrompt('How is the cart cleared after checkout?')
sendPrompt('How does Resend deliver the email?')
sendPrompt('What does the user see after successful payment?')
sendPrompt('What does the confirmation email look like?')
